name: VCM Coil Generator
description: Parametric PCB spiral coil generator for two-axis VCM actuators
description_full:
Generates rectangular, circular, or sector PCB spiral coils for a two-axis Voice-Coil Motor (VCM) actuator.

Features:
- Multi-layer winding (up to 16 layers) with automatic via placement
- Three coil shapes: rectangular, circular (Archimedean), sector
- Series-connection via start/end angle control
- Magnet catalog integration (NdFeB disc/block)
- Save/load parameter presets
- Silkscreen outline generation

Compatible with KiCad 7, 8, 9, 10.
